summary: The diff implements all four requirements: REQ-1 (unified header bar), REQ-2 (no overlap), REQ-3 (scroll-hide behavior), and REQ-4 (hero spacing). The Header.tsx now consolidates logo, tagline, and nav into a single bar. HeroSection.tsx adds pt-20 on the section and top-20 mt-8 on the background image container. The useScrollDirection hook is still used for scroll-hide behavior. No files in frontend/src/hooks/ were modified.
